title: Complex ASCII Diagram Generator
scenario: Design a prompt that can generate a specific complex ASCII diagram involving multiple shapes, lines, and text. The prompt should be able to handle varying levels of complexity and provide clear explanations for each shape and line.
constraints: Must use a specific set of ASCII characters

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the generated diagram match the expected design?
How clear and easy to understand is the generated diagram?
How reusable is the generated prompt in handling different ASCII diagrams?
